label: 499t Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , as added , , , established Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act Industry Advisory Committee, provided for its membership, compensation, etc., directed advisory committee to review Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act program and to make findings and recommendations to Congress and Secretary of Agriculture with respect to future operations of program, with an interim report not later than , and a final report not later than , containing results of its review and recommendations, and provided that advisory committee cease to exist on date of its final report.act June 10, 1930, ch. 436, § 20Pub.
